message:
opencode: Rewrite converter for real export format and add client API

- Replace vibecoded fixtures with real OpenCode export (crud.json)
- Rewrite converter to handle actual export structure (info/messages)
- Add client SDK interface for session.get/messages API calls
- Plugin now tries client API first with event-based fallback
- Simplify tests to single fixture with inline snapshot
